name: referral-program
description: Players invite others via a referral code; referrers earn currency or items when their referees hit a playtime threshold, with daily/lifetime caps and VIP tiering.

items.title: Item prize pool (used when prizeIsCurrency is false)

playtimeThresholdMinutes.title: Minutes referee must play before referrer is paid

referralWindowHours.title: Max hours since first connect to claim a referral

maxReferralsPerDay.title: Max referrals per day
maxReferralsPerDay.description: Maximum number of successful referrals a player can earn per day

maxReferralsLifetime.title: Max referrals lifetime
maxReferralsLifetime.description: Maximum number of paid referrals a player can earn in total (lifetime cap)

permissions.description: Count = tier; +5% referrer reward per tier, capped at +25%
Required for /reflink, /refunlink; bypasses caps and window checks

refcode.description: Get your referral code (generates one if you don't have one yet)
refcode.helpText: Usage: /refcode — Displays your unique referral code. Share it with new players to earn rewards when they join.

referral.description: Claim a referral using a referral code
referral.helpText: Usage: /referral <code> — Enter a referral code from the player who invited you. You must use this within the referral window of your first join (see server config).

arguments.name: code
arguments.helpText: Referral code from the player who invited you

refstats.helpText: Usage: /refstats — View your referral stats including total referrals, earnings, and who referred you.

reftop.description: View the referral leaderboard (top 10 referrers by paid referrals)
reftop.helpText: Usage: /reftop — Shows the top 10 players by number of successful referrals.

reflink.description: Admin: Force-link a referee to a referrer and pay both rewards
reflink.helpText: Usage: /reflink <referee> <referrer> — Admin only. Provide the full exact display name of each player (case-sensitive). Force-creates a paid link and pays both rewards.

arguments.name: referee
arguments.helpText: Full exact display name of the referee player

arguments.name: referrer
arguments.helpText: Full exact display name of the referrer player

refunlink.description: Admin: Remove a referral link for a referee
refunlink.helpText: Usage: /refunlink <referee> — Admin only. Provide the full exact display name of the referee player (case-sensitive). Removes their referral link.

arguments.name: referee
arguments.helpText: Full exact display name of the referee player to unlink

sweep-pending-referrals.description: Walk pending referral links and pay out referrers who have crossed the playtime threshold

reset-daily-counters.description: Reset daily referral counts at UTC midnight

on-player-disconnect.description: Check and pay referrer when a referee disconnects (catches short sessions before the 15-min sweeper runs)
